name: zsnd_backend_init_a3d
description: zSndBackend_InitA3D initializes or reports the host A3D COM provider boundary.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /MD /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for _zSndBackend_InitA3D at 0x4a1d10 still fails: 223 unmasked mismatches, 92 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 319 bytes, VC object symbol size 320 bytes.

Functional coverage is provider-boundary limited: the smoke reaches the real COM/A3D class creation path and accepts either the host's expected provider failure or a successful provider setup with cleanup. It cannot require A3D hardware or registration on every development machine.
